title: Order of the Argent Gryphon
body:
Overview

The Order of the Argent Gryphon is a militaristic and esoteric order guarding its lands in the mountains of Vandura. The Order is known for its discipline, martial culture, and unyielding nature. Depending on who you ask, the Gryphon is either a steadfast warden or a gray butcher.

Notable Battles

What began as a campaign against the uprising of Meriana escalated into a brutal bloodbath, though accounts differ wildly depending on the witness. The incident left behind tales of overwhelming violence, executions, and blood-stained warriors cutting through their enemies without hesitation. Survivors carried the stories across the island, and soon taverns whispered of the "Gray Butchers" of Vandura.

Ethos

The Gryphon holds that pity often prolongs suffering in conflict. Peace is not secured through compassion, but through total annihilation of the enemy and fear among those who help them. Mercy to the wicked now becomes suffering for the innocent later. Therefore, the Order strives for a reputation of relentless resolve, believing that dread is a stronger deterrent than grace.

Related Items

• Griffin Shield 

• War Horn  

• Scroll of Heroic Deeds
